number_of_groups.description: The number of groups of video display terminal users large enough for ten women to become pregnant in one year.

probability_of_cluster.description: The probability of a 'cluster' (six or more miscarriages out of 10), calculated as P(r>=6) = 0.0012 + 0.0001 + 0.0000 + 0.0000 + 0.0000 = 0.0013 from the binomial distribution table.
